history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell (row2, colB) facing right. The goal is at (row4, colD). The cell directly in front of me at (row2, colC) is a floor tile, so I can safely move forward. I need to move east to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column C, facing right. The goal is at row 4, column D. Directly ahead is an empty cell at row 2, column D. Moving forward will get me closer to the goal, and then I can turn to face downward to reach the goal. The cell ahead is safe (floor).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (2,D) facing right. The goal is at (4,D), directly below. To move towards the goal, I need to face downwards. Currently facing right, turning right (clockwise) will make me face down. Then I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column D, facing down (v). The goal is at row 04 column D, directly below. The cell in front of me at row 03 column D is floor (.), and the cell below that is the goal. The path is clear. I can move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column D, facing down. The goal is directly below me at row 04, column D. There is no obstacle in front; the cell is the goal. I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
